spec.reasoning: I used lexical renaming to change the section headers ('Requested table' -> 'Target Table', 'Basic Table' -> 'Source Table') and the sheet name from Hebrew to English. These are full-word to full-word renames maintaining the same descriptiveness. I did NOT rename 'LOG VALUE' since it appears directly in the instruction text as a general reference. I inserted a blank row at the top (positional_title_row perturbation) to shift the title row down, testing whether the agent hardcodes row 1 as the header. I also added a distractor column 'LOG REF' which is plausibly similar to 'LOG VALUE' but clearly different, testing whether the agent confuses it with the actual data column.
